commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio taint nodes ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal node.kubernetes.io/disk-pressure:NoSchedule- 2>&1 || echo taint already gone'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation -o wide 2>&1 | grep -E "prefetch|NAME"'
